hero.imageAlt: Dubai Islands waterfront community by Nakheel
hero.title: Dubai Islands by Nakheel
hero.subtitle: Waterfront Living – A New Beach Experience in Dubai
hero.description: Explore the latest Nakheel project with Dubai Island Villas, offering luxurious living and a new beach experience in one iconic destination. Discover 5 interconnected islands with over 20 km of beachfront, luxury residences, and world-class amenities.

overview.title: Dubai Islands by Nakheel
paragraphs: Dubai Islands is one of the most ambitious waterfront projects in the UAE. It offers a refined vision of waterfront lifestyle, blending coastal beauty with modern urban planning. Nakheel Properties develops this master-planned waterfront community that is part of the well-known Nakheel Group.

This community shows what futuristic living looks like, aligning with Dubai’s 2040 vision and 2025 tourism goals. Dubai Islands is designed as a global vacation destination, combining luxury escapes, premium residences, and a thriving global community that overlooks Dubai’s skyline.
quickFacts: Over 20 km of Dubai Islands beach with clear beach boundaries
5 interconnected islands: Central, Shore, Marina, Golf, and Elite
Freehold properties available for all nationalities
Blue Flag beaches known for water quality, safety, and sustainability
overview.visionTitle: From Deira Islands to Dubai Islands
visionParagraphs: The development was originally launched as Deira Islands. Developers re-envisioned and relaunched it as Dubai Islands, better reflecting Dubai’s evolving urban ambitions. This transformation focuses on sustainable urban planning with eco-friendly features.

Nakheel has a proven portfolio that includes Palm Jumeirah, The World Islands, and Jumeirah Islands. Dubai Islands is a new type of island destination offering strong connectivity, tourism appeal, and residential value.

developer.title: Nakheel Properties – Developer Profile
paragraphs: Dubai Islands reflects the vision of Nakheel Properties, part of the renowned Nakheel Group. Known for iconic developments such as Palm Jumeirah, The World Islands, and Jumeirah Islands, Nakheel brings its expertise in waterfront development and master planning to Dubai Islands.

The development emphasizes quality construction, sustainable features including solar-powered amenities and EV charging stations, and long-term value, giving buyers confidence when considering Dubai Islands by Nakheel.

lifestyle.title: Island Soul Lifestyle – Relaxed, Elegant, Connected to Nature
lifestyle.subtitle: Life on Dubai Islands is inspired by an Island Soul concept – relaxed, elegant, and connected to nature. Residents enjoy beachfront walks, vibrant cafés, curated art and cultural districts, and leisure activities against breathtaking coastal beauty.

propertyTypes.title: Waterfront Property Types
propertyTypes.subtitle: Dubai Islands offers a variety of property types including luxury waterfront apartments, townhouses, semi-detached villas, and exclusive villas, all with freehold ownership available for all nationalities.

types.name: Luxury Waterfront Apartments
perks: Full sea view and panoramic architecture

masterPlan.title: Five Interconnected Islands
masterPlan.subtitle: Dubai Islands consists of 5 distinct islands, each designed with a specific lifestyle focus, creating a diverse and integrated waterfront community.

items.title: Central Island
items.description: The vibrant core with major retail destinations, waterfront dining, cultural attractions, and active community spaces. Ideal for professionals and investors seeking an energetic island lifestyle.

items.title: Shore Island
items.description: Premium beachfront living with direct access to private beaches, beach clubs, and resort-style swimming pools. Residences emphasize Full Sea View, luxury design, and seamless indoor-outdoor living.

items.title: Marina Island
items.description: Built around yachts, marinas, and water transportation. Residents can access a water sports hub, promenade cafés, and leisure experiences enhanced by panoramic architecture and excellent design.

items.title: Golf Island
items.description: Designed for families and long-term residents with landscaped parks, green corridors, and sports courts. Creates a balanced environment focused on wellness and recreation.

items.title: Elite Island
items.description: Ultra-luxury living with exclusive villas, private pools, and refined finishes like stone and wood cladding. Offers unmatched privacy and reflects the pinnacle of luxury residences within Dubai Islands.

amenities.title: World-Class Amenities & Facilities
amenities.subtitle: Dubai Islands delivers a fully integrated lifestyle with private and public beaches, marinas, water parks, beach clubs, and eco-friendly features.

items.title: Blue Flag Beaches
items.description: Over 20 km of Dubai Islands beach with Blue Flag-certified beach zones known for water quality, safety, and sustainability

items.title: Marinas & Yacht Clubs
items.description: Premium marinas and yacht clubs with water transportation and water sports hub for active lifestyle enthusiasts

items.title: Water Park & Beach Clubs
items.description: Water park attractions, beach clubs, and resort-style facilities redefining island living in Dubai

items.title: Landscaped Parks
items.description: Landscaped parks, green corridors, and community spaces designed for families, wellness, and recreation

items.title: Sports & Fitness
items.description: Sports courts, fitness areas, and swimming pools for active residents and families

items.title: Eco-Friendly Features
items.description: Solar-powered amenities, EV charging stations, and sustainable urban planning aligned with Dubai’s 2040 vision

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Dubai Islands

faqs.q: What is Dubai Islands and who is developing it?
faqs.a: Dubai Islands is a master-planned waterfront community developed by Nakheel Properties, part of the renowned Nakheel Group. It includes 5 interconnected islands with beaches, luxury residences, and commercial zones.

Dubai Islands is located near Deira with easy connectivity via Al Khaleej Road and Sheikh Zayed Road. Key areas like Downtown Dubai, Dubai International Airport, and Old Dubai are within 20–25 minutes.

faqs.q: What types of properties are available in Dubai Islands?
faqs.a: The community offers a variety of options including waterfront apartments, townhouses, semi-detached villas, luxury Dubai Island villas like Bay Villas Dubai Islands, and off-plan properties with flexible Payment Plan options.
Yes, freehold properties are available for all nationalities. Buyers get mortgage pre-approved facilities and benefit from competitive pricing.

Dubai Islands features Blue Flag beaches and beach clubs, water park and water sports hub, marinas and water transportation, landscaped parks and green corridors, fitness areas, swimming pools, sports courts, and eco-friendly elements such as solar-powered amenities and EV charging stations.

faqs.q: How does Dubai Islands compare to Palm Jumeirah and The World Islands?
faqs.a: Dubai Islands offers larger beachfronts with beach boundaries, more diverse property options including Vibrant Beach Residences, stronger focus on community living rather than exclusivity, and integrated retail destinations and cultural districts.

faqs.q: What makes Dubai Islands a good investment?
faqs.a: Investors are attracted to Dubai Islands due to strong real estate investing potential, tourism-driven rental demand, backing of Nakheel Group and Nakheel new projects, and premium waterfront lifestyle with panoramic architecture.

Yes, Dubai Islands is ideal for families, with safe beaches and Blue Flag-certified beach zones, green spaces, parks, and community spaces, sports courts, playgrounds, and swimming pools, and proximity to schools and essential services.

faqs.q: What is the expected completion timeline?
faqs.a: Dubai Islands is being developed in phases. Many off-plan properties are available now. Nakheel expects to deliver them according to its development schedule. Early buyers benefit from flexible Payment Plan structures.

faqs.q: Can foreigners buy property in Dubai Islands?
faqs.a: All freehold properties are available for local and international buyers. This makes Dubai Islands an attractive global community for residents and investors.
